intended_use: The HS40 diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Pediatric
intended_use_full: The HS40 diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric and Peripheral vessel.
target_condition: Nerve localization for regional anesthesia procedures
ground_truth: Ground truth established by 10 anesthesiologists and 5 sonographers with >10 years experience; one anesthesiologist drew nerve location outlines, and two or more other anesthesiologists/sonographers reviewed and confirmed accuracy with revision if needed
other_metrics: Speed: 7.93 FPS (frames per second); 95% CI for accuracy: 89.5% to 93.9%; 95% CI for speed: 7.04 to 8.82 FPS; Standard deviation accuracy: 5.6%; Standard deviation speed: 1.11 FPS
